title: Master Template linked to board
excerpt:
Hi! I’m new here on Monday.com and I have so many questions.

posts.author: edoaber (Edoardo Bernasconi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I’m new here on Monday.com and I have so many questions.
I was tinkering with templates and wondering: is there a way so that when changes in a template are made all boards created with the same template change accordingly (and not viceversa).
Let’s say I create a template and 10 boards from that template and then realize the configuration could have been better… must I change all 10 boards one by one?
Thank you!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @edoaber - Welcome to the community! Master templates are exactly what you described. They are still in development and will be coming out for Enterprise plans later this year. If you are curious about whether master templates and other Enterprise features are right for you, I’d be happy to chat with you about it and answer any questions you have. We offer a limited number of free monday․com strategy sessions each week in the community. You can book a time here if you like: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

posts.author: ollyolsen (Shaun Olsen)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you have an update on time frame for Master Templates, its exactly what i need.

posts.author: ollyolsen (Shaun Olsen)
posts.cookedHtml: @PolishedGeek is there an update on this release date?

posts.author: BillS1234 (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: I am glad to see that this was requested and is in the works. It would be exactly what I need. Please advise when we can expect the feature.

posts.author: Annika (Annika Schalkwijk)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any news on the Master template release? Can’t find anything about it and struggeling with the same problem.

posts.author: walt (Walter Derezinski)
posts.cookedHtml: Why is this feature being considered Enterprise and not a lower tier?

posts.author: KevinHolmes (KevinH)
posts.cookedHtml: Have the master templates been rolled out yet?

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: @PolishedGeek Any update on the master template?
